Meta.Title: Derustify - Pro-Grade Offline AI Photo Restoration
Meta.Description: Restore your precious memories with Derustify. 100% offline AI photo restoration. One-time purchase. No cloud, no subscriptions, just privacy.

Hero.Badge: · Subscription free   · Works offline   · No registration   · Just Yours
Hero.Title: Private photo restoration
Hero.Description: Stop paying monthly fees or with your data to see your own photos. Derustify restores your images—sharpening faces, removing scratches, and adding realistic color—directly on your device, keeping your memories 100% private.

Riverfront.AltBefore: Original black and white photo of New York Riverfront

BoyPortrait.Alt: Restored boy portrait with lifelike color

Header.Title: Built for your memories, not for your data.
Header.Subtitle: Most apps rent you your own photos. We give you the tools to own them.

Denoising.Title: High-Fidelity Denoising
Denoising.Description: Remove decades of digital 'rust' and film grain while preserving fine details. Our adaptive AI ensures a clean, natural look without the 'waxed' effect.

Colorization.Title: Lifelike Colorization
Colorization.Description: Breathe life into black-and-white family history. Our AI understands your photos and adds colors that look real, not artificial.

ScratchRemoval.Title: Heal Scratches & Tears
ScratchRemoval.Description: Erase folds, creases, and physical damage from scanned photos. Our inpainting engine restores missing areas while intelligently cloning the original film grain.

FaceRestoration.Title: Ultra-Sharp Face Restore
FaceRestoration.Description: Advanced detection and enhancement bring back clarity to faces that are blurry, faded, or low-resolution, restoring lost expressions with professional precision.

PhotoScanner.Title: Smart Perspective Scanner
PhotoScanner.Description: Turn your phone into a high-end flatbed scanner. Detect photo edges automatically and correct lens distortion for perfect, digital-first archival.

Batch.Title: Revive Entire Albums
Batch.Description: Don't do it one-by-one. Drop in a folder of 500 photos and let the app work. Desktop performance for pro-grade speed on all your archives.

Privacy.Title: Absolute Privacy
Privacy.Description: Your family photos never leave your device. We don't have servers. We don't have accounts. Your moments stay exactly where they belong: with you.

Performance.Title: Native Speed
Performance.Description: Built with high-performance technology that utilizes your local NPU and GPU. No long uploads, no waiting lists—just instant results on your screen.

PrecisionTools.Title: Professional Control
PrecisionTools.Description: Take full control with 'Spectral Weaver' wavelet tools. Manually adjust structural clarity, detail recovery, and film grain for a custom, professional finish.

Header.Title: The honest truth
Header.Subtitle: Everything you need to know about how we're different from the giants.

Q1.A: Because you shouldn't have to 'rent' software to look at your own photos. Modern companies use subscriptions to cover expensive cloud processing. Since Derustify runs on YOUR computer or phone, we have no server costs to pass on to you. You buy it, you own it. Period.

Q2.A: Yes. 100%. We physically cannot see your photos. All the AI magic happens inside your device's memory. No internet connection is required to restore images.

Q3.Q: Will it work on my device?
Q3.A: Derustify is built for modern Windows (10/11) and Android (8.0+). If you have a decent phone or a computer with a graphics card, it will be incredibly fast. If your device is older, it still works—it just takes a few extra seconds to 'clean' each photo.

Q4.Q: What's the catch with the Free version?
Q4.A: The free version has all the power of the Pro version. We just add a small watermark to the corner of your exported images. Upgrading to Pro removes the watermark and unlocks batch processing for those large boxes of family photos in the attic.

Q5.Q: Can I use it as a gift?
Q5.A: Absolutely. It's the perfect gift for the family historian, for your grandparents or anyone in the family that would appreciate restored memories. Purchase it once, install it on the family PC, and spend an afternoon rescuing the family archives together.

Q6.Q: Are the recolored images historically accurate?
Q6.A: No, the recolored images may have historical inaccuracies. The AI models are trained to restore color or to upscale images based on large samples of training data and often succeeds in correct output. Inaccurecies or inadequate coloring of images may occur, and Derustify does not gurarantee perfect results for all images.

Q7.A: Yes. Beyond automatic restoration, Derustify includes 'Spectral Weaver' tools. These allow you to manually adjust fine details, structure, and grain using professional wavelet-domain processing—giving you photoshop-level control over the final result.

CTASection.Title: Don't let your memories fade away.
CTASection.Subtitle: Derustify is coming soon to Windows and Android. No cloud, no monthly fees, just your memories.
